response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with broad polyglot experience and entrepreneurial activity through GISCollective, but the role demands a Director-level IC with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. Experience totals roughly 13-15 years depending on counting, with only minimal recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) at re:cinq since April 2025. There is no evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy leadership, advising strategic customers, or shipping recognized AI products at the scale this Principal role requires.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Entrepreneurial track record founding and sustaining GISCollective open-source platform
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products/platforms built
Lacks Director-level IC influence, strategic customer advisory, or cross-org technical leadership signals
Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage; no platform strategy or cloud architecture leadership

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and products
No Director-level IC / strategic advisory experience
